history.notes: Point1: Unified filename G-MODULE-CODE##-D-MON across all share/download/copy actions with daily auto-reset counter. Point2: Email SEND OUT version selector (CORRECTED v1/IMPROVED v2/POLISHED v3, default v3). Point3: All modules get INPUT/OUTPUT selector in SEND OUT. Point4: Flashcards expanded to 31 topics across 3 categories (TENSES/GRAMMAR/VOCABULARY), 10 cards each, bilingual.
Exercise crash fixed. Chat download-all. Email/Translator/Notes attachment. New app icon. Emoji picker on all toolbars.
